Flat concept inventory:
- Knowledge Life Circle in Language Models | papers: 90abbc2cf38462b954ae1b772fac9532e2ccd8b0; df2b0e26d0599ce3e70df8a9da02e51594e0e992; 077f8329a7b6fa3b7c877a57b81eb6c18b5f87de; 6c4b76232bb72897685d19b3d264c6ee3005bc2b; b1d309073623d46548e55269fb73485a3b7f11a8; 0672f88d5dc762002b515ca4a0a9f101017fea35; 4c6f7fb5c2e1bd12899c3ec2788f9ce7eb2f8a5c; bfeb827d06c1a3583b5cc6d25241203a81f6af09; 031e4e43aaffd7a479738dcea69a2d5be7957aa3; 06a73ad09664435f8b3cd90293f4e05a047cf375; 4f03e69963b9649950ba29ae864a0de8c14f1f86; 56cafbac34f2bb3f6a9828cd228ff281b810d6bb; 5f994dc8cae24ca9d1ed629e517fcc652660ddde; f48ae425e2567be2d993efcaaf74c2274fc9d7c5; c6a84615bc36486cd0170f8a3e1b7e5ec8f5344e; 18e5fb8cec55a75b288a499c57d77ede541dc049; 0ff7f557203d1489110b9d2f89a76245def7b530; 5733233ea20498eba4afbe085038a067d4582f21; e14c93e69cbf9645abb70cef09391f21f644d6d8; 07588dd5d0252c7abc99b3834a81bf23741ead4b; 2c871df72c52b58f05447fcb3afc838168d94505; 4a54d58a4b20e4f3af25cea3c188a12082a95e02; 8c23e7627896b7571648896b7d61b6ef76ece982; 95a251513853c6032bdecebd4b74e15795662986; ba8215e77f35b0d947c7cec39c45df4516e93421; 165d51a547cd920e6ac55660ad5c404dcb9562ed; 73429a5908da503686b52630b5a6d3284d1615a2; f6fbb6809374ca57205bd2cf1421d4f4fa04f975; 708dcd8456426cd609c89a86344e0007c04c80bf; d0086b86103a620a86bc918746df0aa642e2a8a3; 4c5f4ddc68be643fb34ea969bf2c105ff7538995; 5e0cffc51e8b64a8f11326f955fa4b4f1803e3be; 01f2b214962997260020279bd1fd1f8f372249d4; f98e135986414cccf29aec593d547c0656e4d82c; a49e9a8d29b5838ba392d5d33fb9694f4667c59e; a75649771901a4881b44c0ceafa469fcc6e6f968; 53d8b356551a2361020a948f64454a6d599af69f; bc37c6bdb8f39929a58b30464f72d6aa46cddc17; f2885c6a25756cf81aa23b41bc62696a5be5c94d; e337ed6543c2e6e7e51c312c7d998798fc79fdde; c4e991c0c5c21608a5a21d31fd478ce7b7fb527d; 73b6de24eb0e5f6ff4f9c3bdd9257f4554faca19; 68c1bf884f0fc0e86641466a1f1fa67e79f16a17; e2587eddd57bc4ba286d91b27c185083f16f40ee; cdf766403e365643ac4dfdf9e10df8da1b75b63f; 00c209ea764f709a5ce7d7fdc16c2352551bfa83; 3dcfa05a1c162e6cab927c5b08d0444f7b6691f4; 455a8838cde44f288d456d01c76ede95b56dc675; bd20069f5cac3e63083ecf6479abc1799db33ce0; 5270b626feb66c8c363e93ba6608daae93c5003b; 7471cb40a33e9d971a922b5dff5ca9b4a73ca609; 448e1493034dafe35699ae054ff4480b31dcf64a; 1d650f1afd45c59ff907396fe8b678595dcb85ea; 240b0caabb415578bdea4da7d0a32bdff2e8163f; - Knowledge Acquisition | papers: 90abbc2cf38462b954ae1b772fac9532e2ccd8b0; df2b0e26d0599ce3e70df8a9da02e51594e0e992; 077f8329a7b6fa3b7c877a57b81eb6c18b5f87de; 6c4b76232bb72897685d19b3d264c6ee3005bc2b; b1d309073623d46548e55269fb73485a3b7f11a8; 0672f88d5dc762002b515ca4a0a9f101017fea35; 4c6f7fb5c2e1bd12899c3ec2788f9ce7eb2f8a5c; bfeb827d06c1a3583b5cc6d25241203a81f6af09; 031e4e43aaffd7a479738dcea69a2d5be7957aa3; 06a73ad09664435f8b3cd90293f4e05a047cf375; 4f03e69963b9649950ba29ae864a0de8c14f1f86; 56cafbac34f2bb3f6a9828cd228ff281b810d6bb; 5f994dc8cae24ca9d1ed629e517fcc652660ddde; f48ae425e2567be2d993efcaaf74c2274fc9d7c5; c6a84615bc36486cd0170f8a3e1b7e5ec8f5344e; 18e5fb8cec55a75b288a499c57d77ede541dc049; 0ff7f557203d1489110b9d2f89a76245def7b530; 5733233ea20498eba4afbe085038a067d4582f21; e14c93e69cbf9645abb70cef09391f21f644d6d8; 07588dd5d0252c7abc99b3834a81bf23741ead4b

- Knowledge Probing | papers: 708dcd8456426cd609c89a86344e0007c04c80bf; d0086b86103a620a86bc918746df0aa642e2a8a3; 4c5f4ddc68be643fb34ea969bf2c105ff7538995; 5e0cffc51e8b64a8f11326f955fa4b4f1803e3be; 01f2b214962997260020279bd1fd1f8f372249d4; f98e135986414cccf29aec593d547c0656e4d82c; a49e9a8d29b5838ba392d5d33fb9694f4667c59e; a75649771901a4881b44c0ceafa469fcc6e6f968; 53d8b356551a2361020a948f64454a6d599af69f; bc37c6bdb8f39929a58b30464f72d6aa46cddc17; f2885c6a25756cf81aa23b41bc62696a5be5c94d; e337ed6543c2e6e7e51c312c7d998798fc79fdde; c4e991c0c5c21608a5a21d31fd478ce7b7fb527d; 73b6de24eb0e5f6ff4f9c3bdd9257f4554faca19; 68c1bf884f0fc0e86641466a1f1fa67e79f16a17; 95a251513853c6032bdecebd4b74e15795662986; 165d51a547cd920e6ac55660ad5c404dcb9562ed; f6fbb6809374ca57205bd2cf1421d4f4fa04f975; e2587eddd57bc4ba286d91b27c185083f16f40ee; cdf766403e365643ac4dfdf9e10df8da1b75b63f; 00c209ea764f709a5ce7d7fdc16c2352551bfa83; 3dcfa05a1c162e6cab927c5b08d0444f7b6691f4; 455a8838cde44f288d456d01c76ede95b56dc675; bd20069f5cac3e63083ecf6479abc1799db33ce0
